name: Wi-Fi Speed Test
description: Test your internet connection speed right inside luma. Measures download speed, upload speed, and latency with a live speedometer gauge. Every test is saved so you can track your connection quality over time.
details:
Run a full internet speed test without leaving luma. The test measures latency (ping), download speed, and upload speed using Cloudflare's public speed test endpoints, with a live speedometer gauge showing real-time progress.

Every test result is saved locally so you can track your connection quality over time with a history graph and a list of past results.
